scripts.build:services: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/core && npm run build --workspace=apps/fetcher-metals && npm run build --workspace=apps/fetcher-estjt && npm run build --workspace=apps/web-api && npm run build --workspace=apps/telegram-bot
scripts.build: npm run build:services && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n core,metals,estjt,web,tg,fe "npm run dev --workspace=apps/core" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/fetcher-metals" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/fetcher-estjt" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/web-api" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/telegram-bot" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend"
scripts.test: npm run build:shared && npm run test --workspace=apps/core --workspace=apps/fetcher-metals --workspace=apps/fetcher-estjt --workspace=apps/web-api --workspace=apps/telegram-bot --if-present
